scripts.sync:spotify-api: mkdir -p server-lib/spotify && cp ../music-cue/server/spotifySession.ts ../music-cue/server/spotifyClient.ts ../music-cue/server/spotifyHandlers.ts ../music-cue/server/sharedLibraryRemoteStore.ts ../music-cue/server/sharedLibraryStore.ts ../music-cue/shared/sharedLibrary.ts ../music-cue/shared/spotifyLibraryAssembly.ts server-lib/spotify/ && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='server-lib/spotify';for(const f of fs.readdirSync(p)) fs.writeFileSync(p+'/'+f, fs.readFileSync(p+'/'+f,'utf8').replace(/\.js\";/g,'\";').replace(/\.\.\/shared\/sharedLibrary/g,'./sharedLibrary').replace(/\.\.\/shared\/spotifyLibraryAssembly/g,'./spotifyLibraryAssembly').replace(/from \"\.\/sharedLibraryRemoteStore\"/g,'from \"./sharedLibraryRemoteStore\"'))"
scripts.sync:shared-libraries-api: mkdir -p server-lib/sharedLibrary && cp ../music-cue/server/sharedLibraryHandlers.ts ../music-cue/server/sharedLibraryRemoteStore.ts ../music-cue/server/sharedLibraryStore.ts ../music-cue/shared/sharedLibrary.ts server-lib/sharedLibrary/ && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='server-lib/sharedLibrary';for(const f of fs.readdirSync(p)) fs.writeFileSync(p+'/'+f, fs.readFileSync(p+'/'+f,'utf8').replace(/\.js\";/g,'\";').replace(/\.\.\/shared\/sharedLibrary/g,'./sharedLibrary'))"
scripts.build:music-cue: cd ../music-cue && npm install && VITE_BASE_PATH=/music-cue/ VITE_APP_MODE=web npm run build && rm -rf ../frontend/public/music-cue && mkdir -p ../frontend/public/music-cue && cp -r dist/* ../frontend/public/music-cue/
scripts.build: npm run sync:spotify-api && npm run bundle:spotify-api && npm run sync:shared-libraries-api && npm run bundle:shared-libraries-api && npm run build:music-cue && DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true react-scripts build
